015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.entity;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
024
025/**
026 * A mutable wrapper around an {@link HttpBody} that allows overriding the content type.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Use this class when you need to wrap an existing body and attach (or override) its {@code Content-Type}.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * Create instances via the static factory methods:
033 * <p class='bjava'>
034 *    <jc>// Wrap a byte array body with a specific content type</jc>
035 *    HttpBody <jv>body</jv> = HttpBodyBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(ByteArrayBody.<jsm>of</jsm>(<jv>bytes</jv>), <js>"application/octet-stream"</js>);
036 * </p>
037 *
038 * <p>
039 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
040 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
041 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
042 * (and possibly earlier).
043 *
044 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
045 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * @since 9.2.1
049 */
050public final class HttpBodyBean implements HttpBody {
051
052   private final HttpBody delegate;
053   private final String contentType;
054
055   private HttpBodyBean(HttpBody delegate, String contentType) {
056      this.delegate = assertArgNotNull("delegate", delegate);
057      this.contentType = contentType;
058   }
059
060   /**
061    * Creates an {@link HttpBodyBean} wrapping the given body with the specified content type.
062    *
063    * @param body The underlying body. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
064    * @param contentType The content type to report. May be <jk>null</jk>.
065    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
066    */
067   public static HttpBodyBean of(HttpBody body, String contentType) {
068      return new HttpBodyBean(body, contentType);
069   }
070
071   /**
072    * Creates an {@link HttpBodyBean} wrapping the given body and retaining its content type.
073    *
074    * @param body The underlying body. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
075    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
076    */
077   public static HttpBodyBean of(HttpBody body) {
078      return new HttpBodyBean(body, body.getContentType());
079   }
080
081   @Override /* HttpBody */
082   public String getContentType() {
083      return contentType;
084   }
085
086   @Override /* HttpBody */
087   public long getContentLength() {
088      return delegate.getContentLength();
089   }
090
091   @Override /* HttpBody */
092   public boolean isRepeatable() {
093      return delegate.isRepeatable();
094   }
095
096   @Override /* HttpBody */
097   public void writeTo(OutputStream out) throws IOException {
098      delegate.writeTo(out);
099   }
100
101   @Override /* Object */
102   public String toString() {
103      return delegate.toString();
104   }
105}
